/.title: Coleman Lai | Developer & Origami Artist | Vancouver
/.description: Explore software projects and origami portfolio by Coleman Lai, Gen AI Developer at IFS Copperleaf. Computing Science student at SFU, Vancouver, BC.

/portfolio.title: Software Portfolio | Coleman Lai
/portfolio.description: Browse software development projects by Coleman Lai, including web applications, AI implementations, and technical solutions. Currently a Gen AI Software Developer (Co-op) at IFS Copperleaf (Sept 2025-Apr 2026).

/origami.title: Origami Gallery | Coleman Lai
/origami.description: Discover intricate origami creations by Coleman Lai. View complex paper art designs, original patterns, and folding software.

/portfolio/be-square.title: Be Square | Coleman Lai
/portfolio/be-square.description: Portfolio showcase of Be Square - an award-winning Adobe Express AI plugin developed at StormHacks V2. View the implementation details of this hackathon project utilizing OpenAI's GPT and Whisper APIs.

/portfolio/box-pleating.title: box-pleating | Coleman Lai
/portfolio/box-pleating.description: Portfolio showcase of Python library for working with box-pleated origami patterns, featuring FOLD format support and flat-foldability validation.

/portfolio/data-dave.title: Data Dave | Coleman Lai
/portfolio/data-dave.description: Portfolio showcase of Data Dave - an AI-powered data analysis tool that makes CSV data analysis accessible through natural language processing and interactive visualizations.

/portfolio/fold-preview.title: FOLD Preview | Coleman Lai
/portfolio/fold-preview.description: Portfolio description for a Visual Studio Code extension providing interactive preview, syntax highlighting, and editing features for FOLD format origami files, with customizable visualization options.

/portfolio/grid-detection.title: Origami Grid Detection | Coleman Lai
/portfolio/grid-detection.description: Portfolio showcase of Origami Grid Detection - a CNN-based classifier for analyzing origami crease patterns. Built with PyTorch, featuring image preprocessing and grid boundary detection.

/portfolio/hermes.title: Hermes - API Monitoring System | Coleman Lai
/portfolio/hermes.description: Portfolio showcase of Hermes - an automated API monitoring system for tracking REST endpoints. Built for the MCP Hackathon with Python, Gradio, Firebase, and PostgreSQL.

/portfolio/lol-bot.title: League of Legends Discord Bot | Coleman Lai
/portfolio/lol-bot.description: Portfolio showcase of a Discord bot that allows League of Legends players to wager fake currency on their games.

/portfolio/machi-ne.title: MACHI-NE- | Coleman Lai
/portfolio/machi-ne.description: Portfolio showcase of MACHI-NE- - a client-side emergency reporting system created for CMPT 272 at SFU. View project details, features, and implementation of this emergency reporting application.

/portfolio/origami-fractions.title: Origami Fractions | Coleman Lai
/portfolio/origami-fractions.description: Portfolio showcase for Origami Fractions. Input any fraction to get step-by-step folding sequences that will help you mark that fraction on a square piece of paper using different origami methods.

/portfolio/pdf-merge.title: Windows PDF Merger | Coleman Lai
/portfolio/pdf-merge.description: Portfolio showcase of Windows PDF Merger - a simple tool for merging PDF files on Windows.

/portfolio/personal-website.title: Personal Website | Coleman Lai
/portfolio/personal-website.description: Portfolio entry detailing the development and features of colemanlai.com. Learn about the technical implementation of this personal website built with React, TypeScript, and modern web technologies.

/portfolio/sfu-scheduler.title: SFU Scheduler | Coleman Lai
/portfolio/sfu-scheduler.description: Portfolio showcase of SFU Scheduler - a comprehensive course planning tool created for Simon Fraser University students. View project details, features, and implementation of this academic scheduling application.

/portfolio/sphene.title: Project SPHENE | Coleman Lai
/portfolio/sphene.description: Portfolio showcase of Project SPHENE - an asynchronous collaborative note-taking web application that utilizes AI to provide formatted suggestions to fill in gaps in notes based on notes of other users.

/portfolio/spirit-of-salmon.title: The Spirit of Salmon | Coleman Lai
/portfolio/spirit-of-salmon.description: Portfolio showcase of Salmon Run - an educational game made in Unity, created for StormForge by SFU Surge.

/portfolio/template.title: Project Title | Coleman Lai
/portfolio/template.description: A detailed SEO description of the project for search engines and social sharing.

/portfolio/territory-ascent.title: Territory Ascent | Coleman Lai
/portfolio/territory-ascent.description: Portfolio showcase of Territory Ascent - a multiplayer platformer game inspired by Jump King, developed using Pygame and socket programming. Explore the project details, features, and implementation of this engaging gaming experience.

/portfolio/youtube-speed.title: Speed-Based YouTube Quality Adjuster | Coleman Lai
/portfolio/youtube-speed.description: Portfolio showcase of a browser extension that adjusts YouTube video quality based on video speed. Can help save data and improve video playback.

/origami/bladed-tactician.title: The Bladed Tactician | Coleman Lai
/origami/bladed-tactician.description: My first complex design, made for my high school capstone project. 3 were folded, shown in reverse chronological order.

/origami/dagger.title: Dagger | Coleman Lai
/origami/dagger.description: Modified from my Bladed Tactician design.

/origami/distinguished-figure.title: Distinguished Figure | Coleman Lai
/origami/distinguished-figure.description: A chibi little figure that can have either a hood or some hair.

/origami/first-flight.title: First Flight | Coleman Lai
/origami/first-flight.description: A hand holding a paper crane. The crane can be changed into another model.

/origami/hollow-knight.title: Hollow Knight | Coleman Lai
/origami/hollow-knight.description: The knight from the video game Hollow Knight.

/origami/tonberry.title: Tonberry | Coleman Lai
/origami/tonberry.description: From the Final Fantasy series. Crease pattern is just a rough version of the model.

/origami/assassin-0h.title: Dragon Plate Armour Assassin  - No weapon version | Coleman Lai
/origami/assassin-0h.description: My first time doing complex tertiary shaping.

/origami/assassin-2h.title: Dragon Plate Armour Assassin  - Dual Wield version | Coleman Lai
/origami/assassin-2h.description: My most complex fold at the time. Thank you to Boice for giving me the crease pattern.

/origami/fish-owl.title: Blakiston's Fish Owl | Coleman Lai
/origami/fish-owl.description: One of the best designs I've seen.

/origami/griffin.title: Griffin | Coleman Lai
/origami/griffin.description: I may have used a much too small piece of paper for this model.

/origami/hatsune-miku.title: Hatsune Miku | Coleman Lai
/origami/hatsune-miku.description: Makes some people happy, I guess.

/origami/invention-of-the-crane.title: Invention of the Crane | Coleman Lai
/origami/invention-of-the-crane.description: One of my favourite design concepts ever.

/origami/ryujin-3-5.title: Ryujin 3.5 | Coleman Lai
/origami/ryujin-3-5.description: A seven-month journey. 120 hours of work, resulting in my lifelong dream accomplishment.

/origami/walking-in-the-rain.title: Walking in the Rain | Coleman Lai
/origami/walking-in-the-rain.description: One of my favorite designs. This particular image is a refold.
